Now that we've went over how to create an account, I'm going to give you a real quick tour of your click funnels. So right now we're on the dashboard. Depending on the membership that you chose, you may have an action edX or backpack option. If you don't, that's totally okay. You're going to live mainly inside of this area right here, the click funnels. So before we click on that, I do want to show you the two templates that we have available for you to edit. We have both a 42 day detox funnel. So I'm going to go ahead and show you this and it's all editable. So you'll see like this area right here we would want to remove. But this. So you'll see that we have a ton of funnels in here. You probably will not have as many. That's totally okay. So from here, we're going to go ahead and click on the funnel. And it's going to bring it up. So we need to edit this funnel so that it has your personal information instead of the template. But in order to do this, you will need to link your funnel up to a domain name. So we'll be going over how to get a domain in our next video.
